Nay!Footnote-1 I swear by this cityFootnote-2
– this city wherein you have been rendered violable–Footnote-3
and I swear by the parent and his offspring:Footnote-4
Verily We have created man into toil and hardship.Footnote-5
Does he think that no one can overpower him?Footnote-6
He says: “I have squandered enormous wealth.”Footnote-7
Does he believe that none has seen him?Footnote-8
Did We not grant him two eyes,
and a tongue and two lips?Footnote-9
And did We not show him the two highroads (of good and evil)?Footnote-10
But he did not venture to scale the difficult steep.Footnote-11
And what do you know what that difficult steep is?
It is freeing someone's neck from slavery;
or giving food on a day of hunger
to an orphan near of kin;
or to a destitute lying in dust;Footnote-12
and, then besides this, he be one of those who believed,Footnote-13 and enjoined upon one another steadfastness and enjoined upon one another compassion.Footnote-14
These are the People of the Right Hand.
As for those who rejected Our Signs, they are the People of the Left Hand.Footnote-15
Upon them shall be a Fire that will hem them in.Footnote-16
